_comment: TITANIA — Mystic Marsh (gym 3, Fairy) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's takehara_leader_intro geometry VERBATIM: the same relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage/engage_mystic_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Camera pulls up over the challenger's shoulder framing Titania, TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to her face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds mirror starter_reveal's push-in), crosses high for a side profile, then drops home. startTitle names her; a Fairy/Mist-Court theme sells the reveal — amethyst chime + hit sparkle on the pull-up, enchantment-table shimmer at the zoom, amethyst resonance on the profile cross, closing levelup swell. Particles (enchant at the zoom, end_rod at the profile) are anchored ON the leader via `execute at <uuid>` so they land on Titania herself (fixes Cicada's rough challenger-offset placement). IN-WORLD TUNING MAY BE NEEDED: air-verify the zoom-keyframe framing and the particle height (~1 block above the leader's feet) at the real Mystic Marsh arena; nudge if the float-leader hovers higher/lower than assumed. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at b665f300-628d-445b-8a3e-42a5cefca1bd run particle minecraft:enchant ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at b665f300-628d-445b-8a3e-42a5cefca1bd run particle minecraft:end_rod ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
